Operation 'post_hooks' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains scheduling modes but lacks information about the response (created hook object, ID assignment) and side effects (hook queued for delivery). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of what the operation returns and how it affects system state.

data.current_description: Schedule a new hook for delivery at a specific time. Supports UTC, local-time, and relative-delay scheduling modes.
data.description_suggestion: Schedule a new hook for delivery at a specific time. Supports UTC, local-time, and relative-delay scheduling modes. Returns the created hook object with a unique ID and current status. The hook will be queued for delivery according to the specified schedule.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains scheduling modes but lacks information about the response (created hook object, ID assignment) and side effects (hook queued for delivery). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of what the operation returns and how it affects system state.

message: Operation 'get_hooks_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Added context about what information is returned (complete hook object with status, attempts, retry config, payload) and use cases (inspect state and history). This helps AI agents understand the operation's value and when to invoke it.

data.current_description: Retrieve a single hook by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a single hook by its ID. Returns the complete hook object including status, delivery attempts, retry configuration, and payload data. Use this to inspect a specific hook's current state and delivery history.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Added context about what information is returned (complete hook object with status, attempts, retry config, payload) and use cases (inspect state and history). This helps AI agents understand the operation's value and when to invoke it.

message: Operation 'delete_hooks_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is redundant and lacks important context. Clarified that the operation prevents future delivery attempts, aborts pending deliveries, and is irreversible. This helps AI agents understand the consequences and determine if this is the appropriate action.

data.current_description: Cancel a hook. The hook will be cancelled immediately and deleted.
data.description_suggestion: Cancel and delete a hook by ID. The hook will be cancelled immediately, preventing any further delivery attempts. Pending deliveries are aborted and the hook record is removed from the system. This action is irreversible.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is redundant and lacks important context. Clarified that the operation prevents future delivery attempts, aborts pending deliveries, and is irreversible. This helps AI agents understand the consequences and determine if this is the appropriate action.

message: Operation 'post_hooks_bulk_retry' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage, response format, and retry behavior. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure, response format, and how retries are processed. This improves AI agent understanding of how to construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Retry failed hooks in bulk. Provide specific hook IDs or use time-range filters.
data.description_suggestion: Retry failed hooks in bulk using the BulkActionRequest. Provide either specific hook IDs or use time-range filters (startTime/endTime) with optional limit to select hooks. Returns a BulkActionResponse indicating the number of hooks queued for retry. Failed hooks will be retried according to the project's retry policy.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage, response format, and retry behavior. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure, response format, and how retries are processed. This improves AI agent understanding of how to construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'post_hooks_bulk_replay' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage and response format. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure and response format (BulkActionResponse). Clarified that new deliveries are created with original payloads. This helps AI agents understand the operation's mechanics and expected outcomes.

data.current_description: Replay completed hooks in bulk. Creates new hook deliveries with the same payload. Provide specific hook IDs or use time-range filters.
data.description_suggestion: Replay completed hooks in bulk using the BulkActionRequest. Provide either specific hook IDs or use time-range filters (startTime/endTime) with optional limit to select hooks. Creates new hook deliveries with the same payload as the original hooks. Returns a BulkActionResponse indicating the number of hooks queued for replay.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage and response format. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure and response format (BulkActionResponse). Clarified that new deliveries are created with original payloads. This helps AI agents understand the operation's mechanics and expected outcomes.

message: Operation 'post_hooks_bulk_cancel' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage, response format, and cancellation effects. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure, response format, and clarified that cancellation prevents future delivery attempts. This improves AI agent understanding of how to use the operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Cancel pending hooks in bulk. Provide specific hook IDs or use time-range filters.
data.description_suggestion: Cancel pending hooks in bulk using the BulkActionRequest. Provide either specific hook IDs or use time-range filters (startTime/endTime) with optional limit to select hooks. Cancels the selected hooks immediately, preventing further delivery attempts. Returns a BulkActionResponse indicating the number of hooks cancelled.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks details about request schema usage, response format, and cancellation effects. Added information about BulkActionRequest structure, response format, and clarified that cancellation prevents future delivery attempts. This improves AI agent understanding of how to use the operation and what to expect.
